title: Phase 1: MLS encryption integration
description:
Integrate openmls for end-to-end encrypted messaging. Currently all payloads are raw UTF-8 bytes sent unencrypted. MLS (Messaging Layer Security, RFC 9420) provides forward secrecy, break-in recovery, and group support.

Phase 1 scope: two-party groups only (1:1 DMs). Group MLS is Phase 5.

Required:
- Key package publication endpoint on relay (or out-of-band key exchange)
- Two-party MLS group setup on first contact between Alice and Bob
- Ratchet state persistence in client-side encrypted SQLite
- Encrypt payload before Envelope construction, decrypt after Deliver received
- Update ClearMessage serde to work inside MLS ciphertext
